data.title: Oneview Healthcare Director Adjusts CDI Holdings Amid RSU Vesting
data.description:
Oneview Healthcare Chess Depository Interests repr 1 ( (AU:ONE) ) has issued an announcement.

Oneview Healthcare PLC has announced a change in the director’s interest notice, specifically involving Barbara Nelson. The change includes the acquisition of 208,333 Chess Depository Interests (CDIs) upon the vesting of Restricted Share Units (RSUs) and the sale of 102,083 CDIs to settle mandatory Irish payroll income taxes. This adjustment results in a net increase in Nelson’s holdings, reflecting a strategic move to manage tax obligations while maintaining a significant stake in the company.

More about Oneview Healthcare Chess Depository Interests repr 1

Oneview Healthcare PLC operates in the healthcare industry, providing technology solutions aimed at enhancing patient care and engagement. The company focuses on delivering innovative healthcare software that integrates with existing hospital systems to improve operational efficiencies and patient experiences.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: $152.6M

data.title: Emperor Metals Secures Strategic Investment Through Private Placement
data.description:
Emperor Metals, Inc. ( (TSE:AUOZ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Emperor Metals Inc. has announced a non-brokered private placement financing of up to $1.5 million through the issuance of 10 million units. The proceeds will be used for exploration and development of its projects and general working capital. Notably, Evanachan Limited, controlled by Robert McEwen, will acquire 50% of the offering, signaling strong strategic interest and potential long-term investment in Emperor’s innovative approach to resource development.

More about Emperor Metals, Inc.

Emperor Metals Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold projects. The company is known for its innovative use of AI and machine learning in project evaluation and resource modeling, which positions it uniquely in the market.

YTD Price Performance: 56.25%

Average Trading Volume: 265,732

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$13.97M

data.title: VerticalScope Reports Strong Q4 2024 Financial Results Amidst Strategic Growth
data.description:
VerticalScope Holdings, Inc. ( (TSE:FORA) ) has shared an update.

VerticalScope Holdings Inc. reported strong financial results for Q4 2024, with revenue increasing by 11% to $19.9 million, and Adjusted EBITDA rising by 22% to $10.1 million. The company achieved a record 114 million monthly active users, reflecting a 6% year-over-year growth. Despite a net loss due to increased share-based compensation and interest expenses, VerticalScope’s robust financial performance was driven by significant growth in digital advertising and strategic acquisitions, positioning it for future expansion.

More about VerticalScope Holdings, Inc.

VerticalScope Holdings Inc. is a technology company that operates a cloud-based digital platform for online enthusiast communities. The company focuses on digital advertising and community engagement, leveraging programmatic and direct advertising channels to drive growth.

YTD Price Performance: 1.12%

Average Trading Volume: 40,904

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$231.1M

data.title: FOXO Technologies’ Subsidiary Achieves Stable Occupancy Rates
data.description:
FOXO Technologies ( (FOXO) ) has provided an update.

On March 12, 2025, FOXO Technologies announced that its subsidiary, Myrtle Recovery Centers, Inc., has stabilized its Oneida, Tennessee facility with a consistent occupancy rate of 75% or higher since early 2025 and has finalized contracts with major managed care organizations. Additionally, Myrtle will participate as a Silver Sponsor in the ETAADAC Conference in Knoxville, Tennessee, from March 19-21, 2025, which will gather industry leaders to discuss addiction counseling and treatment advancements.

More about FOXO Technologies

FOXO Technologies Inc. operates in the healthcare and biotechnology sectors, owning subsidiaries such as Myrtle Recovery Centers, Inc., which provides inpatient and outpatient behavioral health services, and FOXO Labs, Inc., which focuses on biotechnology innovations to enhance human health and lifespan.

Average Trading Volume: 7,567,369

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: IBM Updates Revenue Reporting Categories for 2025
data.description:
International Business Machines ( (IBM) ) has issued an announcement.

IBM announced changes to its revenue reporting categories within its Software and Consulting segments, effective from the first quarter of 2025. These updates aim to better align with market opportunities and provide more relevant information to investors, without affecting IBM’s consolidated financial statements. The changes involve recasting historical financials for 2023 and 2024 and adjusting revenue categories to reflect the company’s strategic focus on hybrid cloud, automation, data, and transaction processing. This move is intended to enhance transparency and allow investors to update their financial models ahead of the first quarter earnings report in April 2025.

More about International Business Machines

International Business Machines (IBM) operates in the technology industry, focusing on software and consulting services. The company provides hybrid cloud platforms, automation, data management, and transaction processing solutions, as well as consulting services to help clients design and build cloud architectures and optimize business processes.

YTD Price Performance: 14.00%

Average Trading Volume: 4,608,479

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $230.8B

data.title: Air New Zealand Announces Share Buy-Back to Enhance Shareholder Value
data.description:
Air New Zealand Limited ( (ANZFF) ) just unveiled an update.

Air New Zealand Limited has announced the acquisition of 2,516,275 ordinary shares as part of its share buy-back program, with shares acquired both on-market and off-market. This move, approved by the board, is aimed at enhancing shareholder value by reducing the number of shares outstanding, which could potentially improve earnings per share and strengthen the company’s market position.

More about Air New Zealand Limited

Air New Zealand Limited is a prominent airline operating in the aviation industry, providing air travel services primarily within New Zealand and internationally. The company is listed on the New Zealand Stock Exchange (NZX) and the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX), focusing on passenger and cargo transportation.

data.title: Pegasus Resources Strengthens Uranium Portfolio with New Funding
data.description:
Pegasus Resources ( (TSE:PEGA) ) just unveiled an update.

Pegasus Resources has successfully closed a non-brokered private placement, raising over $340,000. This funding allows the company to secure a 75% ownership stake in the Utah-based Jupiter uranium project, with plans to achieve full ownership through a maiden drill program. This strategic move is expected to enhance Pegasus’s asset base and position it for further expansion in the uranium sector.

More about Pegasus Resources

Pegasus Resources Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on uranium projects. The company is involved in resource development and aims to create long-term value through its projects, particularly in Utah.

data.title: BW Offshore Sells FPSO BW Pioneer and Secures O&M Contract
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from BW Offshore ( (GB:0RKH) ).

BW Offshore has agreed to sell the FPSO BW Pioneer to a subsidiary of Murphy Oil Corporation for USD 125 million. The sale aligns with BW Offshore’s strategy to leverage its existing FPSO fleet and includes a five-year operations and maintenance contract, enhancing the company’s financial position and supporting its long-term growth strategy in floating production infrastructure and energy transition solutions.

More about BW Offshore

BW Offshore engineers innovative floating production solutions and operates a fleet of three FPSOs, with ambitions for growth. With over four decades of experience in offshore operations and project execution, the company provides tailored offshore energy solutions globally. BW Offshore is publicly listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange and employs around 1,100 people.

YTD Price Performance: -2.32%

Average Trading Volume: 2,410

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.title: Perdoceo Education Approves 2025 Annual Incentive Plan
data.description:
Perdoceo Education ( (PRDO) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 6, 2025, Perdoceo Education Corporation’s Compensation Committee approved the 2025 Annual Incentive Plan, which mirrors the 2024 plan in structure, focusing on adjusted operating income and individual goals for senior executives. Additionally, the committee approved salary and incentive adjustments for key executives, including a 6.25% salary increase for CEO Todd Nelson and a 20% increase in the Long-Term Incentive target for CFO Ashish Ghia.
